_note: Source-of-truth ledger for suppliers + co-man contacts + order history, so 'who's the rep / what did we order / what price / who to CC' is DATA, not an email hunt. The audit + draft steps read this. Update when an order is placed or a contact changes.

people.name: Lisa Trujillo
people.title: Ops admin / Purchasing
people.for: inventory counts, packaging on-hand, purchasing — CC on inventory + packaging asks

people.name: John
people.title: Ops / shipping
people.for: BOL / pickups / shipping; 'BOL sent to John' = run picked up

cary.name: The Cary Company
cary.note: Order from Daniel at QUOTED pricing (better than the website). Containers ship 500/box. Lead time can split when out of stock (PO 720273 split into SO672604 + SO672606). PRICING BREAKS in 5,000-unit increments — round order qty up to the next 5,000 for a better rate.

atl.name: American Tape & Labels (ATL)
atl.note: We do NOT always order every label type, and quantities vary — always confirm what an order covered by SKU.

inventory_counts.source: FK EOM tracker (Nathan) + handwritten 5/28 + Lisa box count
inventory_counts.note: Latest FULL packaging count. Does NOT reflect the 6/10 and 6/15-17 runs' consumption — see packaging.json asOf. Fresh count requested 6/20.
